description: Graphic in portrait format. A color photograph fills the upper two-thirds: President Donald Trump (left, dark navy suit, red tie, white hair, small US flag lapel pin) stands shoulder-to-shoulder with Chinese leader Xi Jinping (right, dark navy suit, magenta and purple tie) on a gray paved plaza, with Chinese palace and temple architecture (white marble balustrades, tiled-roof pavilions) blurred in the background. Both men face the camera. The lower third fades into a dark navy gradient bar carrying a bold white headline in mixed roman and italic serif: 'President Trump Secures Historic Deals with China, Delivering for American Workers, Farmers and Industry.' At bottom is the engraved White House building logomark and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: President Trump Secures Historic Deals with China, Delivering for American Workers, Farmers and Industry / The WHITE HOUSE
